sentences.arabic: شَهِدَتِ الْأَسْوَاقُ الْمَحَلِّيَّةُ ارْتِفَاعًا فِي أَسْعَارِ الْمَوَادِّ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Lokalna tržišta zabilježila su porast cijena prehrambenih proizvoda.
sentences.translationEn: Local markets have seen an increase in food prices.

sentences.arabic: يَبْحَثُ الْمُوَاطِنُونَ عَنْ طُرُقٍ لِتَوْفِيرِ الْمَالِ عِنْدَ التَّسَوُّقِ.
sentences.translation: Građani traže načine da uštede novac prilikom kupovine.
sentences.translationEn: Citizens are looking for ways to save money when shopping.

sentences.arabic: تَقُولُ الْحُكُومَةُ إِنَّهَا سَتَعْمَلُ عَلَى دَعْمِ الْعَائِلَاتِ الْفَقِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada kaže da će raditi na podršci siromašnim porodicama.
sentences.translationEn: The government says it will work on supporting poor families.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَنَّى النَّاسُ أَنْ تَنْخَفِضَ الْأَسْعَارُ فِي الشَّهْرِ الْقَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi se nadaju da će cijene pasti u narednom mjesecu.
sentences.translationEn: People hope that prices will decrease next month.
